title: Shearer Candles Dusky Pink - Dinner Candles - 10 inch - Unscented Dinner Candles - 11 Hour Burn Time, Pack of 6 (PR1B47)
features: COLOURED CANDLES : Stunning Dusky Pink Straight 10 Inch dinner candles. SIZE: H: 254mm x Diameter: 22.5mm

MULTIPURPOSE: Shearer dinner candles are the perfect way to set the mood for a romantic dinner, special event, or just to add some extra ambiance to your home. Our dinner candles are 8 inches tall and come in various colours to match any decor. Beautifully coloured dinner candles are also ideal as wedding candles. You can choose the perfect colour that fits into your wedding's colour scheme and style. Whether you want to create an atmosphere of relaxation or add some chic to your dinner table, Shearer Candles dinner candles are a great choice.

FRAGRANCE FREE: These candles can be used in various place around the home. They are smokeless while burning. It is perfect for allergy sufferers or those who don't like strong scents. Why not try in your living room. Your mantelpiece? They will add a touch of high elegance, which is easy to achieve, and everyone will love them. Fits into any standard candlestick holder.

CLEAN BURNING: Looking for dinner candles that won't drip or leave wax marks on your table or in your candle holders? Look no further than our selection of clean burning dinner candles! Made from quality coloured wax, our dinner candles will provide a straight and soft light that is perfect for any home or event. Plus, you'll never have to worry about drips or messes with our clean burning dinner candles. Give them a try today and see the difference!
Made in Scotland, UK, Candlemakers for over 125 years
description: Product Description 10" available in a wide variety of colours from classic ivory to vibrant red. The perfect finishing touch for every event or interior. Manufactured and designed in the UK by Shearer Candles. Founded in 1897 on the outskirts of Glasgow, Shearer Candles is the UK's longest established lifestyle candle company. Shearer Candles prides itself on delivering high quality candles that contain only the finest ingredients. Taking an average of six months from drawing board to first flame, we don't rush things. Each candle has its own Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Dispose of remnants responsibly.
